title: What is the Core 30?
content_md:
# What is the Core 30?

- Code: 73adfe6f
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=73adfe6ff12047f5b015b608c193f868
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/9e1a62e8488c459188490f2185a39a81?sid=fe48bc4f-bbb7-464e-8169-d4f4f4d77be9https://www.loom.com/share/9e1a62e8488c459188490f2185a39a81?sid=fe48bc4f-bbb7-464e-8169-d4f4f4d77be9
- Duration: 2m 45s
- Resources:
  - [Done-For-You SEO Services](https://icecreamtruck.shop/collections/our-services)

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: Okay, so let me talk here about the core 30 what it is why I keep talking about it
So one thing to keep in mind take a little step back here
the every single
piece of content every article every URL everything on your website is there to rank the Google business profile higher
Okay, we are not trying to rank individual articles or individual URLs or individual pages
Everything is trying to build
Topical or geographical relevance so that we can rank the Google business profile higher
That's all we're trying to do when we talk about local SEO rank the GBP higher
Okay, we don't care about individual website URLs or anything like that
So we always start by building topical relevance first, right? We can't build geographical relevance without topical relevance
Right, we can't build relevance for the city of Chicago before we've ever built relevance for plumbing
so we start with topical relevance and
The easiest and most effective way to build topical relevance is to make sure that we have an article a URL on
Your website with a long-form content about every category and every service that's on your Google business profile
Okay, if you do that your website structure will match your GBP
Exactly and you end up with tens of thousands of words of topically relevant content
Okay, so that is the core 30 most
GVPs have three to five categories 20 to 30 services if we add and about us or contact us
We roughly come up with 30 to 40 pages
So we called it the core 30 because that sounds better than the core 40
So it's the core 30 meaning it's the 30 core pages that exactly match the categories and services on your GBP
Okay, that's the core 30 now when we're building the core 30
We're always going to watch our rank map. We're going to set it up to automatically run a rank map every week or every other week and
We're going to keep an eye on that as we publish the core 30
Content and source links to the core 30 content
The reason we're going to keep an eye on it is we will often find that we're ranking across the entire map
Before we even finish the core 30. It's so powerful
This core 30 concept is so powerful that we often don't even get all the way through it before we're done with local SEO
Okay, I would say over the years
80 plus percent of local businesses that we do SEO for we don't finish the core 30 and they're ranked everywhere
Around their area that they want to be ranked and as I mentioned as we're building this content
We also need to source links to that content. You can't forget to source the links
